# fatih guzel

> software engineer from turkey. i design and build reliable, high-performance software systems.

## about

fatih guzel is a software engineer interested in systems, distributed systems,
simplicity, abstractions, performance, product engineering, and the fundamentals
behind good engineering.

the site contains personal notes, project references, work/contact information,
and writing on engineering, systems, technology, work, and the software industry.

## projects

- vemi: a tiny, type-safe markdown compiler used by this site's article pipeline.
- chrome dino learns to run: a neural-network demo project for chrome's offline dino game.
- mips processor from first principles: a single-cycle mips processor implementation.
- stack over papers: an open repository and community around computer science papers.
